description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a metallic top and a pull-tab opening. The can is predominantly a deep red color with a speckled texture, bordered at the top and bottom by a decorative geometric pattern in turquoise, black, and red. The front features a large yellow label with the bold black text 'Josta' and an illustration of a black panther or feline stretching across the top of the label. Additional text below the main logo reads 'with Guarana & other natural flavors,' and the side of the can provides a detailed description of 'The Legend of Guarana.' The back of the can displays a standard nutrition facts panel and more product information in yellow text. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, with a strong emphasis on branding and product story.
description: A red, speckled beverage can with bold 'Josta' branding, a black panther graphic, and decorative geometric borders. Features detailed product and nutritional information on the sides.
description_view_0: The can's front shows the large 'Josta' logo, black panther graphic, and part of the decorative border.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the panther graphic stretching across the yellow label and the continuation of the geometric border.
description_view_2: The back view displays the 'Josta' logo, a detailed product story about guarana, and more of the decorative border.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the nutrition facts panel and additional product information in yellow text.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Josta' brand logo is prominently displayed on the front and back of the can, featuring bold black text on a yellow background with a black panther graphic above it.
attribute_flavor_indication: Text on the can indicates 'with Guarana & other natural flavors' and references 'The Legend of Guarana.'
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back of the can, listing calories and other nutritional information in yellow text.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A black panther mascot graphic is present above the 'Josta' logo on the front and back of the can.
